# MDE 1.5.2

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Normalized the Settings dialog Theme navigation button padding so its top, right, bottom, and left spacing are visually consistent.
- Fixed user manual screenshot capture so Electron screenshots use the real `1280x820` viewport instead of full-page renderer height.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added `MDE_E2E_WINDOW_MODE` for Electron E2E runs, with hidden mode as the default for ordinary tests and visible/inactive modes available for debugging and screenshot generation.
- Added unit and integration coverage for E2E window-mode parsing, launch environment injection, and main-window ready-to-show behavior.
- Added CI manual screenshot generation before the user manual build, with screenshot artifacts uploaded for review.
- Added screenshot quality checks for expected PNG dimensions, file completeness, and stable app-shell rendering.

## Documentation

- Refreshed all zh-CN user manual screenshots at `1280x820`.
- Updated README guidance for hidden E2E mode and visible manual screenshot debugging.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run docs:screenshots`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "loads README markdown into the block editor surface"`
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "selects and persists a manual theme from settings"`
- Functional Playwright E2E coverage in `npm run test:e2e` passed all 46 `tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts` tests under hidden window mode.

Verification caveat: the trailing editor performance smoke step in `npm run test:e2e` still failed under current machine load with the same over-budget stages reproduced in a clean `HEAD` baseline before this change, so it is tracked as an existing/environmental performance-gate issue rather than a regression from this release.

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow. If signing secrets are not configured, macOS artifacts are unsigned.
- Windows NSIS installer and updater artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow.
